notes: v0.3.8: Video clip save feedback. v0.3.7 silently swallowed save errors to devtools console, so when the new safety guards rejected a blob the user had no idea why — it just looked like nothing happened. v0.3.8 adds visible success and error banners above the video card: success shows the save path, errors show the exact exception message with a dismiss button. Also adds a 1-second minimum record duration to prevent the empty-blob race where clicking Record → Stop within a few hundred ms produced a sub-1KB blob that the size guards rejected. Press Ctrl+Shift+I to open devtools for full verbose logs.
